title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Fyers - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Fyers - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Fyers in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers:
Fyers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers!
